headline: Newmont Royalty Deal At Saddle North Highlights Evolving Project Economics
summary: Summit Royalties Ltd. has agreed to acquire a 1.0% net smelter return royalty on Newmont's Saddle North gold copper deposit. The royalty interest is tied to a deposit within Newmont's broader project portfolio, adding a new financial partner to this asset. This transaction focuses attention on how Newmont (NYSE:NEM) structures ownership and revenue sharing across its resource base. Newmont, trading as NYSE:NEM, is one of the largest gold producers globally and also has exposure to copper,...
